summary: Tested Commission Auto-Trigger System for CLT ERP. All backend endpoints working correctly (23/23 tests passed). Frontend UI verified for Sales Executive, CS Head, and CEO views. Auto-trigger wiring confirmed in server.py for enrollment, CS upgrade, and BD redeposit events.

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect missing dependency 'fetchData' - minor, not blocking

passed_tests: GET /api/commissions/transactions - Sales sees only own transactions
GET /api/commissions/transactions - CS sees only own transactions
Transaction data structure has all required fields (id, student_name, course_matched, amount, status, agent_name, commission)
CS upgrade trigger wired in server.py (line 6522-6527)
BD redeposit trigger wired in server.py (line 5957-5961)
Sales Executive Commission Dashboard loads with My Transactions table
Sales Executive sees approval status banner (pending/approved)
Sales Executive My Transactions table shows Student, Course, Amount, Commission, Status columns
CEO Commission Dashboard loads with tabs (Sales, CS, Approve Transactions, CEO Pools)
CEO Approve Transactions tab shows transaction table with all columns
CEO Approve Transactions tab has Generate Transactions button
CEO Approve Transactions tab has Approve All Pending button
CEO Approve Transactions tab has department filter
CS Head Commission Dashboard loads with team commission table
CS Head sees approval status banner
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-trigger implementation is correctly wired: commission_auto.py is imported and called inline when stage changes to enrolled (line 3553), CS upgrade recorded (line 6522), and BD redeposit recorded (line 5957)
Non-CEO users correctly filtered to see only their own transactions (line 26649: query['agent_id'] = user['id'])
Transaction edit correctly preserves original_commission for audit trail (line 26724)
All commission endpoints properly restrict access to CEO (super_admin) role
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 123+ commission transactions in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission Auto-Trigger System fully tested. Auto-trigger wiring verified in server.py for: (1) enrollment at line 3553-3564, (2) CS upgrade at line 6522-6527, (3) BD redeposit at line 5957-5961. All transaction CRUD endpoints working: GET with filters, approve single, bulk-approve, edit with notes. Non-CEO users see only their own transactions. Frontend displays correctly for Sales (My Transactions table), CS Head (team commission table), and CEO (Approve Transactions tab with full controls).

auto_trigger_enrollment.notes: Called when lead stage changes to 'enrolled'. Creates commission transaction for sales executive.

auto_trigger_cs_upgrade.notes: Called when CS upgrade is recorded. Creates commission transaction for CS agent.

auto_trigger_bd_redeposit.notes: Called when BD redeposit is recorded. Creates commission transaction for BD agent.

get_transactions_non_ceo.notes: Non-CEO users see only their own transactions (agent_id filter applied at line 26649)

my_transactions_table.notes: Sales/CS users see My Transactions table with Student, Course, Amount, Commission, Status columns

modified_commission_strikethrough.notes: When final_commission !== original_commission, original is shown with line-through

ceo_approve_transactions_tab.notes: CEO sees full transaction table with Agent, Type, Student, Amount, Course, Commission, Status, Actions columns

approve_single_transaction.notes: CEO only. Sets status=approved, approved_by, approved_at.

edit_transaction.notes: CEO only. Updates final_commission, ceo_notes. Preserves original_commission. Optional approve flag.
